license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.8i8huhw
title: Crude extraction of Xylella fastidiosa from infected leaves
author: Niels Appelman

steps_raw.instruction: Pick leaves from plants infected with X. fastidiosa
With a scalpel, remove the first 2 cm of the central nerve of the plant was removed. Note: X. fastidiosa is located in the xylem in this nerve. Including mesophyll will reduce the yield.
Crush the central nerve and extract bacteria with 50 ml of 0.01 M potassium phosphate buffer.
Drain the extract in a 50 ml conical centrifuge tube.
